input.context: I need to explain my idea.

chosen: Try a three sentence explanation: point, example, next step. One small next step is to draft the first sentence.
rejected: Great job, say whatever feels right and keep going.

input.reflectionText: I started even though it was small.

chosen: You practiced starting before it felt complete. Next, add one visible piece to the same task.
rejected: This proves you are very disciplined.

chosen: Name what worked: the main point was clear. Suggest one next step: add a short example.
rejected: Make it more positive so they feel good.

chosen: Common theme: the idea was clear. Try the next version with one pause after the first line.
rejected: Everyone liked it, so keep doing the same thing.

chosen: Capture one sentence that names the preference and why. Keep private context out. Ask for feedback on clarity.
rejected: Post everything so people can see the full story.

chosen: Pick the smallest restart action and do it once today. Save one sentence of proof after.
rejected: You need a stronger routine and more commitment.

input.reflectionText: I gave feedback without taking over.

chosen: You practiced helping inside the request. Next time, add one example from their proof.
rejected: You are clearly a helpful person now.

chosen: Try: The main point was hard to find. One useful next step is to move it to the first sentence.
rejected: Try: This was confusing and needs work.

chosen: The structure worked. Next, add one short reason so the reader can decide faster.
rejected: The feedback says you are doing well overall.

chosen: Keep the review focused on one observation and one next step. Avoid judging the person.
rejected: Tell them the truth as directly as possible.
